description_long: This object is a small bird with a streamlined body, predominantly brown on the upperparts and white on the underparts. The wings and tail are brown, with subtle lighter markings visible on the wings. The head is white, blending into the brown of the back, and the beak is slender and pointed, colored yellowish. The legs are short and appear to be a pale pinkish or flesh tone. The bird's tail is long and straight, tapering to a point, and the overall feather pattern is smooth with some gentle gradients between the brown and white areas.
description: A small, brown and white bird with a pointed yellowish beak, long straight tail, and smooth feather gradients.
description_view_0: Side view showing the bird's brown upperparts, white underparts, and pointed yellowish beak.
description_view_1: Rear view highlighting the long, straight tail and the brown coloration of the back and wings.
description_view_2: Opposite side view displaying the same brown and white color pattern and the slender body shape.
description_view_3: Front view showing the white head, blending into the brown back, and the narrow profile of the beak.
attribute_plumage_pattern: smooth gradient with brown upperparts and white underparts, subtle lighter markings on wings
